visuals.title: Memory Management Basics
visuals.description: Visual overview of memory hierarchy, address binding with MMU, contiguous allocation strategies (First/Best/Worst Fit), fragmentation types, and memory protection

diagrams.note: Speed decreases from registers (fastest) to disk (slowest)
Binding at compile time (fixed), load time (relocatable), or execution time (requires HW support)
First Fit is generally preferred for speed and comparable waste to Best Fit
Internal: wasted space within partition; External: scattered free space prevents large allocations
